name: Ultimate AI RCA - Two Phase Architecture (Passed Included)

parameters.subject: 🎯 Final Execution Dashboard Summary
parameters.message:
={{ "

🚀 Execution Dashboard

" + $json.html + "
" }}

parameters.jsCode:
const all = $input.item.json.allCasesList || [];
return all.map(c => ({ json: c }));

const failed = $input.item.json.failedCasesList || [];
return failed.map(c => ({ json: c }));

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚨 Failed: ' + $json.testTitle }}
parameters.message:
={{ "

❌ Failure Alert

File: " + $json.filename + "

Case: " + $json.testTitle + "

🤖 AI Root Cause Analysis:

" + $json.aiAnalysis.replace(/\n/g, '
') + "

Logs:

" + $json.error + "
" }}
